summary: Iteration 27 - Full end-to-end live match flow testing complete. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly. CSK vs SRH (ipl2026_027) is live and properly discovered via SportMonks.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/matches/refresh-live-status returns correct structure (newly_promoted, still_live, completed arrays)
Backend: refresh-live-status discovers CSK vs SRH (ipl2026_027) as live from SportMonks
Backend: GET /api/schedule shows ipl2026_027 with status='live'
Backend: Schedule counts correct (1 live, 59 upcoming, 10 completed)
Backend: POST /api/matches/ipl2026_027/fetch-live returns source='sportmonks'
Backend: claudePrediction contains team1_win_pct, team2_win_pct, historical_factors
Backend: historical_factors contains h2h_win_pct, venue_win_pct, recent_form_pct, toss_advantage_pct
Backend: weightedPrediction contains team1_pct, team2_pct, alpha, H, L, breakdown
Backend: breakdown contains run_rate_ratio, wickets_in_hand_ratio, phase_momentum
Backend: yetToBat and yetToBowl arrays present in fetch-live response
Backend: POST /api/matches/ipl2026_027/check-status returns is_live, is_finished, sportmonks_status
Backend: GET /api/live/current returns live_matches array with ipl2026_027
Frontend: Live tab shows CSK vs SRH match card with LIVE badge
Frontend: Refresh Matches button visible with data-testid='refresh-live-btn'
Frontend: Clicking Refresh Matches shows result banner '1 match still live'
Frontend: Live match page loads with data-testid='live-match-page'
Frontend: Check Status button visible with data-testid='check-status-btn'
Frontend: Fetch Live Scores button visible with data-testid='fetch-live-btn'
Frontend: Dual prediction models section visible with data-testid='dual-prediction-models'
Frontend: Weighted Probability panel visible with data-testid='weighted-prediction'
Frontend: Claude Opus Prediction panel visible with data-testid='claude-live-prediction'
Frontend: LOW CONSENSUS indicator visible with data-testid='model-consensus' (diff 24.7%)
Frontend: Yet to Bat section visible with data-testid='yet-to-bat'
Frontend: Yet to Bowl section visible with data-testid='yet-to-bowl'
Frontend: Refresh Both button visible with data-testid='refresh-predictions-btn'
critical_code_review_comments: refresh-live-status endpoint (lines 731-914) correctly discovers live matches from SportMonks + CricAPI fallback
fetch-live endpoint (lines 371-601) correctly returns SportMonks data with dual predictions
compute_weighted_prediction function (lines 267-367) correctly implements P(win) = alpha*H + (1-alpha)*L formula
Model Consensus Indicator (LiveMatch.js lines 346-384) correctly shows LOW/MODERATE/HIGH based on prediction difference
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: None - used existing live match data from SportMonks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 features fully working. CSK vs SRH (ipl2026_027) is currently live. The refresh-live-status endpoint discovers live matches from SportMonks and promotes them. The fetch-live endpoint returns dual predictions (Weighted + Claude) with historical_factors. The Model Consensus Indicator shows LOW (red) when models diverge >15%, MODERATE (yellow) 5-15%, HIGH (green) <=5%. Current state: 1 live, 59 upcoming, 10 completed matches.

refresh_live_status.description: POST /api/matches/refresh-live-status discovers live IPL matches from SportMonks + CricAPI
refresh_live_status.verification: Returns newly_promoted, still_live, completed arrays. Found CSK vs SRH as live.

schedule_live_promotion.verification: ipl2026_027 shows status='live' with score 'CSK 30/4 (8.4 ov)'

fetch_live_sportmonks.verification: source='sportmonks', includes liveData, sportmonks, batsmen, bowler, yetToBat, yetToBowl

claude_prediction.verification: CSK 82% vs SRH 18%, historical_factors: h2h=0.58, venue=0.72, form=0.65, toss=0.55

weighted_prediction.description: weightedPrediction contains team1_pct, team2_pct, alpha, H, L, breakdown

model_consensus_indicator.description: Shows LOW/MODERATE/HIGH consensus based on prediction difference

refresh_matches_button.description: Refresh Matches button on Live tab with data-testid='refresh-live-btn'
refresh_matches_button.verification: Button visible and functional, shows result banner after click

check_status_button.description: Check Status button on live match page with data-testid='check-status-btn'

yet_to_bat_bowl.description: Yet to Bat and Yet to Bowl sections on live match page
yet_to_bat_bowl.verification: Both sections visible with player names
